title: Courage (disambiguation)
content:
'''Courage''' was the name given to a number of [[Starship/Legends|starships]]:
*[[Courage (blastboat)|''Courage'']], a [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]
*[[Courage (Thranta-class War Cruiser)|''Courage'']], a [[Thranta-class War Cruiser|''Thranta''-class War Cruiser]]

{{Disambig}}
